title: ED abdominal pain documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.
red_flags.rationale: The exact DHA adult abdominal-pain history section supports documenting onset, duration, severity, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician-assessed risk context for an adult emergency presentation; it does not diagnose the cause.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Specifies onset, duration, location, character, severity, associated gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological, exposure, travel, trauma, and medical-history domains.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

red_flags.text: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.
red_flags.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording time-critical symptoms or abnormal observations only when the clinician assessed them; it never asserts a red flag is absent.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists sudden or severe pain, fever, vomiting, rigid abdomen, bleeding, weight loss, dysphagia, haematuria, pregnancy, and shock-associated features.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

red_flags.text: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.
red_flags.rationale: The exact referral section supports recording escalation, disposition, specialist discussion or handover only when the clinician made or arranged it.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists specialist and emergency referral criteria for adult abdominal pain.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

red_flags.text: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.
red_flags.rationale: The adult virtual-care scope was reviewed and limits transfer to an undifferentiated in-person ED presentation.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines adult abdominal-pain use in DHA-licensed telehealth and excludes emergency and controlled-medication scenarios.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

investigations.text: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.
investigations.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording test and imaging status only when already ordered, performed or reviewed by the clinician, without recommending testing.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists blood tests, urinalysis, pregnancy testing, pancreatic enzymes, and imaging selected according to the clinical assessment.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Abdominal Pain in Adults – 11

source_limitations: Pediatric, pregnancy, trauma, postoperative and older/frail abdominal pain; detailed pain descriptors; gastrointestinal, urinary, gynaecological and testicular domains; prior surgery/procedure; medicines; anticoagulation; examination; diagnosis; investigation selection; treatment; observation; and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
